name: list_templates
description: List all email templates in your SparkPost account. Templates define reusable email content with substitution variables. Each template can have a draft and a published version. You can also create, update, preview, and delete templates through sub-endpoints. Returns up to 50,000 templates.

parameters.name: draft
parameters.description: If true, returns draft versions of templates. If false, returns published versions. Default varies by endpoint.

parameters.name: shared_with_subaccounts
parameters.description: If true, only returns templates shared with subaccounts.

sub_endpoints.description: Create a new template (creates as draft by default)

sub_endpoints.note: Set "published": true in the request body

sub_endpoints.description: Preview a template with substitution data

results.name: Welcome Email
results.description: Sent to new users after signup
